perf: Tablet image uses official Ubuntu cloud rootfs — no debootstrap, ~5 min build

Replaced debootstrap (~5 min) with official Ubuntu 24.04 minimal cloud
image download (~30s). Removed cache tarball (was the bottleneck).
Timeout reduced from 60 to 30 minutes. Expected build: 5-8 min.

commit.message:
Add Quarkus backend with domain model, repositories, and REST API

- Scaffolded Quarkus 3.17.8 project with rest-jackson, hibernate-orm-panache, jdbc-postgresql, hibernate-validator, smallrye-openapi
- Created 7 JPA entities: Project, Author, Mention, SavedFilter, ScheduledReport, Recipient, Alert
- Created Panache repositories for all entities
- Created 8 REST resources: Project, Mention, Author, Filter, Report, Recipient, Alert, Analysis
- Configured PostgreSQL datasource and CORS
- Added import.sql with seed data for Mytek and Tunisianet projects

commit.message:
Add SSE events for task mutations

Emit `task:changed` via the global bus from every task-store
mutation (create, update, delete, reorder, link/unlink).
Frontend handles the event by reloading the task list, which
auto-syncs selectedTask via the existing useEffect.

This covers both Express route and agent tool call paths since
the emit happens at the store level.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phases 2-8 components and services

Color & Channel:
- ColorPicker: RGB/Kelvin modes, canvas spectrum, history (16 recent)
- EyedropperTool: 8x magnifier, real-time hex preview
- ChannelList/Header: drag reorder, solo/mute, inline rename
- ChannelTemplateModal: 6 templates with preview
- ChannelCreateModal: ID validation, spatial hints
- GroupPanel: Mirror/Spread/Alternate modes with offsets

Effects & Timeline:
- Effect spread patterns for all 13 types × 6 layouts
- Effect preview engine with per-type animation curves
- Effect flatten to static keyframes with auto-restore
- EffectProperties panel with type-specific params
- TimelineContextMenu: unified right-click with effect submenu
- ShortcutsHelp: categorized keyboard shortcuts modal

Import/Export:
- .lightfx export with group expansion and V-001-V-021 validation
- .lightfx import with ID generation
- .lightfx-project JSON save/load with File System Access API
- Marketplace OAuth + publish client
- MovieMetadataModal: IMDB/TMDB manual entry
- ExportDialog: validation summary + duration warnings

Overlay & Detection:
- LightingOverlay: canvas overlay with front/surround/ambient zones
- LightIcons: spatial-positioned channel indicators on video
- Video metadata extraction: EBML (MKV/WebM) + MP4 parsing
- Scene detection: chi-squared histogram comparison
- WelcomeFlow: 5-step onboarding

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Dashboard page with mentions list, sorting, infinite scroll, and filters panel

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(shared): add MentionCard and FilterBuilder components

Add two Angular 19 standalone shared components:

- MentionCard: displays mention details with author info, highlighted
  keyword text, engagement stats, and visit/ignore/filter actions.
  Uses signal-based input()/output() API.

- FilterBuilder: collapsible filter panel with 10 sections covering
  date range, platforms, authors, sentiment, reach/likes/reposts/
  comments ranges, visited status, and language. Highlights active
  filter sections and emits filterChange on every change.

Both components use inject(), @if/@for control flow, and Angular
Material modules.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Multi-user YouTube auth with auto-refresh

Global default account (family Premium) + per-user overrides.
Resolution: get_auth('youtube', user_id='jake') → jake's → global.
Storage keys: 'youtube' = global, 'youtube:jake' = per-user.
ensure_fresh_token() auto-refreshes within 5-min expiry buffer.
Google refresh tokens last indefinitely — one-time login only.
Admin: set-global endpoint, per-user start/complete, user_id param.
MediaView: global account card, per-user list, Set as Default button.
91 tests passing (25 new: multi-user, fallback, auto-refresh, endpoints).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add deterministic timestamps to tool calls

Forward SDK event.timestamp from tool.execution_start and
tool.execution_complete through the SSE pipeline. Display start time
and duration in ToolCallBlock when expanded (e.g. "6:59:03 PM · 1.2s").

- Add startedAt/completedAt to ToolCall interface
- Forward event.timestamp in session-manager tool_start/tool_done emits
- Populate timestamps in history reconstruction for past sessions
- Carry startedAt on PendingTool through to completed ToolCall
- Render timestamp + duration in ToolCallBlock expanded view

Graceful restart: activity tracking, enhanced /api/busy, graceful shutdown, SIGTERM handler, launcher stuck detection

- SessionManager tracks per-session startedAt/lastEventAt, exposed via getSessionActivity()
- GET /api/busy now returns per-session metadata with staleMs
- New gracefulShutdown() aborts all active sessions before stopping SDK client
- POST /api/shutdown endpoint for clean shutdown from launcher
- SIGTERM + SIGINT both use gracefulShutdown() instead of raw client.stop()
- Launcher waits up to 60 min (was 15), breaks early when all sessions stuck (5+ min stale)
- Launcher uses POST /api/shutdown before force-kill, waits 15s for clean exit

commit.message:
feat(k8s): add production-ready Kubernetes manifests for all services

- namespace.yaml: orbit-commerce namespace
- secrets.yaml: shared Secret template (SECRET_KEY, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, ADMIN_KEY)
- configmap.yaml: shared ConfigMap (POSTGRES_HOST, OTLP_ENDPOINT, LOG_LEVEL + inter-service URLs)
- postgres/postgres.yaml: ConfigMap (init-db.sql), Secret, PVC (10Gi), StatefulSet, ClusterIP Service
- user-service/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 8001), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- product-service/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 8002), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- order-service/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 8003), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- payment-service/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 8004), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- notification-service/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 8005), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- frontend/deployment.yaml: Deployment (2 replicas, port 3000), ConfigMap, ClusterIP Service
- nginx/deployment.yaml: ConfigMap (nginx.conf with rate limiting), Deployment (2 replicas), LoadBalancer Service
- nginx/ingress.yaml: Ingress routing /api/* to each service and /* to frontend
- monitoring/prometheus.yaml: ConfigMap (scrape configs), PVC (10Gi), Deployment, ClusterIP Service
- monitoring/grafana.yaml: PVC (5Gi), Secret, Deployment, ClusterIP Service
- tracing/jaeger.yaml: Deployment (all-in-one), UI Service (16686), Collector Service (14268/14250/4317)

All workloads include resource requests/limits (200m CPU, 256Mi memory for API services),
liveness/readiness probes, RollingUpdate strategy, and are scoped to orbit-commerce namespace.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix the accuracy issue by update celu formula based on spec (#33500)

### Details:
- The implementation didn't align with [ONNX
spec](https://onnx.ai/onnx/operators/onnx__Celu.html).
```
max(0,x) + min(0,alpha*(exp(x/alpha)-1))
```
 

### Tickets:
 - [CVS-178958](https://jira.devtools.intel.com/browse/CVS-178958)

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  (from_attributes), RefundRequest

  EXPOSE 8004

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

TECHDEBT-35: Fix VultronEvent to carry rich domain objects

Replace the flat ID/type string fields on VultronEvent with 7 rich
VultronObject | None fields (object_, target, context, origin,
inner_object, inner_target, inner_context) that mirror the AS2 Activity
structure at the core layer.

Changes:
- events/base.py: Replace 14 flat fields with 7 VultronObject fields;
  add derived @property for all old names (backward compat); object_
  uses trailing underscore because 'object' is a Python built-in
- events/_mixins.py: Add rich 'foo' property alongside each 'foo_id'
  property; properties return self.object_, self.target, etc. with
  domain-typed hints under TYPE_CHECKING
- event subclasses (report, case, embargo, note, status, case_participant,
  actor): Remove explicit typed domain fields (report: VultronReport,
  case: VultronCase, etc.) — now provided by mixin properties
- extractor.py: Update _build_domain_kwargs() to use object_= instead of
  per-semantic keys; add _to_domain_obj() helper; remove all flat _id/_type
  kwargs from constructor call; import VultronObject
- test_report_use_cases.py: Update 3 event constructors to use object_=

All 988 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(release): harden media runtime and publish packaging

Why: ingest outputs could overwrite each other, audio/video capability checks drifted between runtime and providers, and the publish pipeline could fail lint or ship stale dist artifacts.

Why: this keeps the validated 0.2.1 release changes together and makes the npm publish path reproducible.

commit.message:
feat: Complete OS image builder for tablet satellite

Rewrites build-image.sh from ISO-remaster to full debootstrap+chroot
OS builder. The output is a ready-to-flash image — no installer runs
on the tablet. Flash, boot, connect WiFi, avatar appears.

build-image.sh (12-phase OS builder):
  - debootstrap Ubuntu Noble (24.04) minimal rootfs
  - Installs Openbox + Chromium kiosk (no full DE)
  - Installs linux-surface kernel for Surface Go support
  - Pre-installs Atlas satellite agent + Python venv
  - Captive portal for touchscreen WiFi setup on first boot
  - mDNS announce service (avahi-publish)
  - First-boot service for unique hostname/satellite ID
  - Squashfs + GRUB bootable ISO output
  - Optional --raw disk image format
  - Cleanup trap, SHA256 checksum generation

.github/workflows/build-tablet-image.yml:
  - Mirrors Pi image builder pattern (build-satellite-image.yml)
  - Triggers: release, monthly schedule, manual dispatch
  - Option to include/exclude linux-surface kernel
  - Uploads artifact + GitHub Release with checksums
  - 60-minute timeout

install-tablet.sh retained as alternative for existing Ubuntu.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Release v0.2.15

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add first-visit language picker

Shows a full-screen language selector on first visit (no sudoku-lang in localStorage).
Selecting a language saves to localStorage and dismisses the screen.
Subsequent visits skip straight to the app.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove background transition on cells to eliminate selection flicker

Animating background on 20+ cells simultaneously when selection changes
causes a visible flash. Selection highlighting should be instant.
Only color (text) transitions remain for smooth given/error changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add AttachmentContent slot to StrataChatComposer (above text input)

commit.message:
Improve controls: number clears after placement, cell stays selected

New interaction flow:
- Tap cell (no number armed) → selects cell
- Tap number (cell selected) → fills cell, number clears, cell stays selected
- Tap number (no cell) → arms number
- Tap cell (number armed) → fills cell, number clears, cell stays selected
- Notes mode: number stays selected after use for rapid multi-candidate entry
- Tap same cell again (no number) → deselects

Same flow applied to creator mode.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
